title: Add score() to KernelRidge / GaussianProcessRegressor / GaussianProcessClassifier
description:
sklearn ClassifierMixin.score = mean accuracy; RegressorMixin.score = R². Currently missing on:
- FittedKernelRidge (regressor — R²)
- FittedGaussianProcessRegressor (regressor — R²)
- FittedGaussianProcessClassifier (classifier — mean accuracy)
Apply the standard r2_score / mean_accuracy pattern used in the other audited crates.
